name: Sun Quan (Zhongmou)
page_title: Sun Quan (Zhongmou) 孫權 (仲謀) [Wu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Sun Quan did not preside over Guan Yu’s execution. He did, however, send Pan Zhang and Zhu Ran to intercept and kill Guan Yu during his flight from Jing.

full_text:
Sun Quan (Zhongmou) 孫權 (仲謀)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Quan (孫權), styledZhongmou (仲謀), was born in Fu Chun County, Wu Prefecture (Presently Fu Yang, Zhe Jiang Province). Sun Jian’s second son. Sun Ce’s brother. Long-lived first Emperor of Wu. Sun Quan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun Quan lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
Return to theThree Kingdoms Encyclopediaor browse theEncyclopedia Directory.

Fact vs Fiction
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
Sun Quan did not preside over Guan Yu’s execution. He did, however, send Pan Zhang and Zhu Ran to intercept and kill Guan Yu during his flight from Jing.
